channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Survey shows younger Canadian men more inclined to traditional gender views
item.description: A recent survey by Ipsos and the Global Institute for Women’s Leadership at King’s College London reveals that Canadian men under 35 are more likely than the general population to believe gender equal...

item.title: Cameron Smith discusses potential impact of Adam Reynolds’ injury on Broncos
item.description: Cameron Smith has raised questions about the challenges facing the Brisbane Broncos following Adam Reynolds’ recent injury. The former rugby league captain highlighted the tough decision that coach Mi...

item.title: How Multivitamins Can Support Health Across Different Life Stages
item.description: Multivitamins are among the most commonly taken supplements globally, yet there remains confusion about their use and benefits. A recent study suggests that a daily multivitamin may modestly reduce bi...

item.title: FlySafair Considers Temporary Ticket Surcharge as Fuel Prices Soar
item.description: FlySafair has indicated that it is considering introducing a temporary ticket surcharge following a sharp 70% increase in jet fuel prices. The airline attributes the spike to the ongoing Middle East c...

item.title: University Students Show Appreciation to Lecturer with Gifts During Class
item.description: A group of university students recently pulled a heartwarming surprise on their favourite lecturer during a class session. They planned meticulously, decorating the classroom and preparing a small pre...

item.title: We Are Imaginary Returns to Rappler Live Jam to Perform Old Hits and Tracks from Self-Titled Album
item.description: The indie rock band We Are Imaginary is set to perform live at Rappler Headquarters in Manila as part of the Rappler Live Jam series on Thursday, March 12, 2026, starting at 8:00 PM Philippine time. O...

item.title: Thierry Henry Defends Arsenal's Pragmatic Approach After 1-1 Draw Against Bayer Leverkusen
item.description: Arsenal legend Thierry Henry has come out strongly to defend the team's current style of play under manager Mikel Arteta, even as some critics dey call am 'boring'. Despite Arsenal dey lead the Premie...

item.title: Sarah Langa celebrates 33rd birthday with month-long luxury events
item.description: South African influencer and model Sarah Langa recently marked her 33rd birthday with an extravagant month-long celebration. Sharing glimpses of her luxurious lifestyle on Instagram, Langa treated her...

item.title: Brent Crude Prices Rise Amid Iran-Related Shipping Disruptions and Global Market Volatility
item.description: Brent crude oil briefly surpassed $100 per barrel early Thursday, marking another significant surge just days after it neared $120 due to escalating tensions in the Middle East. Iranian attacks on com...

item.title: Coast leaders divided over Joho's push for deputy presidency in 2027
item.description: Political tensions are rising in the Coast region ahead of the 2027 elections due to Hassan Joho’s bid to become Deputy President alongside President William Ruto. Joho, who is Cabinet Secretary for M...

item.title: ASEAN Ministers Convene to Discuss Economic and Security Impacts of Middle East Conflict on Southeast Asia
item.description: The escalating conflict in the Middle East, particularly the joint US and Israeli strikes on Iran that began nearly two weeks ago, has severely disrupted global energy markets and trade routes, prompt...

item.title: Kenya arrests man for attempting to smuggle over 2,000 live ants from Nairobi airport
item.description: Authorities in Kenya apprehended a 27-year-old Chinese national, Zhang Kequn, at Jomo Kenyatta International Airport for attempting to smuggle over 2,200 live garden ants out of the country. Immigrati...

item.title: Sindh Government Declares March 13 as Public Holiday for All Offices
item.description: The Sindh government has officially declared March 13, 2026, which falls on a Friday, as a public holiday across the province. The notification, issued by the provincial administration, covers all gov...

item.title: Police Seize Alleged Satanic Effigy in Karachi Ahead of Youm Al Quds Rally
item.description: In Karachi, police have taken into custody a large white statue from Mehran Town in the Korangi Industrial Area after videos of it spread rapidly on social media. The statue shows a human male figure ...

item.title: Learning Welsh as a Family Heritage
item.description: Dan Fox reflects on his journey to reconnect with his Welsh heritage through language. Although his maternal grandmother and mother were native Welsh speakers, he grew up in southern England speaking ...

item.title: Former ASIO chief resigns from royal commission over role and pay concerns
item.description: Dennis Richardson, former head of ASIO, has resigned from his position as special adviser to the Royal Commission on Antisemitism and Social Cohesion, stating he felt he was 'surplus to requirements'....

item.title: Freezing rain and high winds leave thousands in Quebec without power and prompt school closures
item.description: On Thursday morning, over 200,000 Hydro-Québec customers woke up without electricity due to freezing rain and strong winds that brought down power lines overnight. While Quebec avoided the worst of th...

item.title: East Africa urged to strengthen efforts for women’s rights and opportunities
item.description: As East Africa marked International Women’s Day on March 8, leaders and advocates called for more practical steps to advance gender equality and support women and girls. The theme for this year, 'Give...

item.title: PIA and Other Pakistani Airlines Increase Fuel Surcharges Due to Gulf Conflict
item.description: Pakistani airlines, including the national carrier Pakistan International Airlines (PIA), have increased fuel surcharges following the ongoing conflict in the Gulf region, which has disrupted air rout...

item.title: Kerala Chief Minister highlights communal harmony as the state's key strength
item.description: Kerala Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan has emphasised that the real narrative of Kerala is reflected in the state's longstanding tradition of communal harmony and social cohesion. Speaking to NDTV, he...
